quotes: The flighty purpose never is o'ertook, Unless the deed go with it.

defs: Indulging in flights, or wild and unrestrained sallies, of imagination, humor, caprice, etc.; given to disordered fancies and extravagant conduct; volatile; giddy; eccentric; slightly delirious.
quotes: Proofs of my flighty and paradoxical turn of mind.
A harsh disciplinarian and a flighty enthusiast.
